description: Spruce Health provides a cloud-based communication platform for healthcare practices, including phone, messaging, fax, video, and related workflow tools. It also offers API-based integrations for syncing patient/contact and conversation data with external systems such as EHRs and practice tools.
summary: Spruce Health exposes a documented REST API at `https://api.sprucehealth.com/v1` for contacts, conversations, media, organization data, phone lines, scheduled messages, transcriptions, and webhook endpoint management; no public GraphQL API, MCP server, or CLI was found.
